modes.name: balanced
modes.summary: Default safe crop that improves structure while preserving broad scene readability.
modes.menu_blurb: Safer first pass. Improves composition without aggressively sacrificing context.

modes.name: narrative
modes.summary: Protects human relationships, secondary actors, and contextual story cues.
modes.menu_blurb: Best when the scene works because multiple people or actions relate across space.

modes.name: webb_risky
modes.summary: Pushes layer pressure, edge tension, and density harder in pursuit of a more Alex Webb-like result.
modes.menu_blurb: Most aggressive option. Better for layered tension, but easier to over-tighten.
